title: Drone attack
description: Attacks on Russia's largest fuel storage facility in Caucasus damage up to 15 tanks – video Satellite imagery indicates that up to 15 fuel storage tanks were damaged at a major oil facility in southern Russia following drone attacks. Read the full article on our website

description: And here are the "Flamingos" themselves in flight 🔥 The "VNIIR-Progress" plant, where the flight arrived, produces equipment for "Shakhedov", "Iskanderov" and "Kalibrov". The Ukrainian border is about 1,000 km away. A good migration distance for such a bird.
description_en: And here are the "Flamingos" themselves in flight 🔥 The "VNIIR-Progress" plant, where the flight arrived, produces equipment for "Shakhedov", "Iskanderov" and "Kalibrov". The Ukrainian border is about 1,000 km away. A good migration distance for such a bird.
description_uk: А вот и сами «Фламинго» в полете 🔥 Завод «ВНИИР-Прогресс», по которому был прилет, выпускает оборудование для «Шахедов», «Искандеров» и «Калибров». До украинской границы — около 1000 км. Неплохая дальность миграции для такой птицы.

title: Kyiv: Drone strike
description: Update: Ukrainian missiles, drones reportedly hit oil refinery, manufacturing site in long-range strikes on Russia. An oil refinery in the Russian city of Samara was struck by Ukrainian drones, and a manufacturing facility in Cheboksary was struck by missiles overnight on June 10, social media channels reported.

title: Kyiv: Missile strike
description: Update: Russian military official killed in car bombing outside Moscow, media reports. The victim of a car bombing outside Moscow has been identified as Damir Davydov, a Russian military official responsible for missile and artillery ammunition supplies, according to Russian investigative outlet The Insider.
description_en: Update: Russian military official killed in car bombing outside Moscow, media reports. The victim of a car bombing outside Moscow has been identified as Damir Davydov, a Russian military official responsible for missile and artillery ammunition supplies, according to Russian investigative outlet The Insider.

title: Mariupol: Drone strike
description: Ukraine strikes ammo depot in Russia's Belgorod Oblast, confirms fuel tank destruction near Mariupol. In its latest update, the General Staff said Ukrainian forces struck an ammunition depot, command posts, drone control centers, logistics hubs, and troop concentrations across Russia and occupied Ukraine on June 8 and overnight into June 9.
description_en: Ukraine strikes ammo depot in Russia's Belgorod Oblast, confirms fuel tank destruction near Mariupol. In its latest update, the General Staff said Ukrainian forces struck an ammunition depot, command posts, drone control centers, logistics hubs, and troop concentrations across Russia and occupied Ukraine on June 8 and overnight into June 9.

title: Kherson: Drone strike
description: Chonhar Bridge struck in occupied Kherson Oblast as Ukraine steps up pressure on Russian logistics routes in Crimea. This is the second time in the past three days that the bridge has been closed, following an overnight strike on June 7 involving Ukrainian FP-2 and Behemot drones.
description_en: Chonhar Bridge struck in occupied Kherson Oblast as Ukraine steps up pressure on Russian logistics routes in Crimea. This is the second time in the past three days that the bridge has been closed, following an overnight strike on June 7 involving Ukrainian FP-2 and Behemot drones.

title: Sumy: Casualties reported
description: Man killed in Russian drone attack on Sumy Oblast A man was killed in a Russian drone attack on a residential area in the Putyvl hromada, Sumy Oblast, on 9 June. A hromada is an administrative unit designating a village, several villages, or a town, and their adjacent territories – ed. Read the full article on our website

title: Casualties reported
description: The ideal solution in peace negotiations is to urgently end the war. At least the first step to take is an unconditional complete ceasefire. This is important. Ceasefire is also a complex process. Yes, it is about political will and decision, but at the same time, today there are kill zones of 20, 30, 40 kilometers. If there are no guarantors and monitoring of the ceasefire, Russia can take advantage of this and advance by 20...
description_en: The ideal solution in peace negotiations is to urgently end the war. At least the first step to take is an unconditional complete ceasefire. This is important. Ceasefire is also a complex process. Yes, it is about political will and decision, but at the same time, today there are kill zones of 20, 30, 40 kilometers. If there are no guarantors and monitoring of the ceasefire, Russia can take advantage of this and advance by 20...
description_uk: Ідеальне рішення в мирних перемовинах – терміново закінчити війну. Хоча б перший крок зробити – безумовне повне припинення вогню. Це важливо. Припинення вогню – це також складний процес. Так, це про політичну волю і рішення, але разом з тим сьогодні є кілзони на 20, 30, 40 кілометрів. Якщо не буде гарантерів та моніторингу припинення вогню, Росія може скористатися цим і просунутись уперед на 20...

title: Kramatorsk: Evacuation ordered
description: Donetsk Oblast expands mandatory evacuation zone for families with children Authorities in Donetsk Oblast have expanded the zone of mandatory evacuation for families with children, ordering compulsory evacuations from specific streets in Sloviansk, Kramatorsk and the village of Bilenke, as well as from the entirety of Pryvillia and Malotaranivka. Read the full article on our website
description_en: Donetsk Oblast expands mandatory evacuation zone for families with children Authorities in Donetsk Oblast have expanded the zone of mandatory evacuation for families with children, ordering compulsory evacuations from specific streets in Sloviansk, Kramatorsk and the village of Bilenke, as well as from the entirety of Pryvillia and Malotaranivka. Read the full article on our website

title: Kyiv: Explosions reported
description: Car bombing outside Moscow reportedly kills man in Russian military housing district. The explosion occurred at around 5:30 a.m. local time while the vehicle was moving near an apartment building on Koldunova Street in Balashikha’s Aviatorov district, according to Russia’s Investigative Committee.
description_en: Car bombing outside Moscow reportedly kills man in Russian military housing district. The explosion occurred at around 5:30 a.m. local time while the vehicle was moving near an apartment building on Koldunova Street in Balashikha’s Aviatorov district, according to Russia’s Investigative Committee.
description_uk: Car bombing outside Moscow reportedly kills man in Russian military housing district. The explosion occurred at around 5:30 a.m. local time while the vehicle was moving near an apartment building on Koldunova Street in Balashikha’s Aviatorov district, according to Russia’s Investigative Committee.

title: Kharkiv: Casualties reported
description: 💬 Minister of Foreign Affairs Andriy Sybiga commented on Russia's ongoing terror against civilians: "Having not achieved its goals on the battlefield, Russia is intensifying terror against civilians. The world cannot turn a blind eye to its scale. At least three people died, including a pregnant 22-year-old woman, in Chuguyev as a result of Russia's nighttime terrorist attacks on Kharkiv and the region. In Zaporizhzhia, Russian strikes killed...

Світ не може закривати очі на його масштаби. Щонайменше троє людей загинули, серед них вагітна 22-річна жінка, у Чугуєві внаслідок нічних терористичних атак Росії на Харків та область. У Запоріжжі російські удари вбили...

title: Kharkiv: Air defense active
description: Ukrainian drones are already autonomously shooting down Shaheds 👥 The protection of the Ukrainian sky is getting a qualitatively new tool. This was announced by the Minister of Defense of Ukraine Mykhailo Fedorov. One of the members of Brave1 developed a system that takes over 95% of the entire process of intercepting enemy drones. All a person has to do is select a target and press the command. The technology has already proven its effectiveness in real combat...
description_en: Ukrainian drones are already autonomously shooting down Shaheds 👥 The protection of the Ukrainian sky is getting a qualitatively new tool. This was announced by the Minister of Defense of Ukraine Mykhailo Fedorov. One of the members of Brave1 developed a system that takes over 95% of the entire process of intercepting enemy drones. All a person has to do is select a target and press the command. The technology has already proven its effectiveness in real combat...
description_uk: Українські дрони вже автономно збивають Shahedи 👥 Захист українського неба отримує якісно новий інструмент. Про це повідомив Міністр Оборони України Михайло Федоров. Один із учасників Brave1 розробив систему, яка бере на себе 95% усього процесу перехоплення ворожих дронів. Людині залишається лише вибрати ціль і натиснути команду. Технологія вже підтвердила свою ефективність у реальних бойових...
